---
title: "e-Portfolio DES Santé Publique"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d/%m/%Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: false
    latex_engine: pdflatex
geometry: "a4paper, margin=2cm, top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm"
header-includes:
  - \usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
  - \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
  - \usepackage[french]{babel}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{longtable}
  - \usepackage{hyperref}
  - \definecolor{desblue}{RGB}{26,42,74}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhf{}
  - \fancyhead[L]{\small\textcolor{desblue}{\textbf{e-Portfolio DES Sant\'e Publique}}}
  - \fancyhead[R]{\small\textcolor{gray}{R\'ef\'erentiel 2016}}
  - \fancyfoot[C]{\small\thepage}
  - \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
params:
  user_info: NULL
  sections: !r c("identite","contrat","connaissances","competences","stages","phases")
  id_data: NULL
  diplomes: NULL
  contrat: NULL
  eval_conn: NULL
  eval_comp: NULL
  stages: NULL
  phases: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# Helpers locaux — aucun accès DB
label_conn <- function(s) {
  if (is.null(s) || is.na(s) || identical(s, "")) return("--")
  switch(s,
    non_evalue = "Non evalue", non_acquis = "Non acquis", acquis = "Acquis", "--")
}
label_comp <- function(s) {
  if (is.null(s) || is.na(s) || identical(s, "")) return("--")
  switch(s,
    non_evalue = "Non evalue", non_acquis = "Non acquis",
    en_cours = "En cours", acquis = "Acquis", "--")
}

nn <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || (length(x)==1 && (is.na(x) || identical(x,"")))) return("--")
  x
}
```

\newpage

# Informations generales

**Interne :** `r if(!is.null(params$user_info)) paste(params$user_info$prenom, params$user_info$nom) else "--"`

**Document genere le :** `r format(Sys.time(), "%d/%m/%Y a %H:%M")`

---

```{r identite, eval=("identite" %in% params$sections), results='asis'}
cat("# Fiche d'identite\n\n")
id <- params$id_data
if (!is.null(id) && nrow(id) > 0) {
  cat(paste0("**Nom :** ",                nn(id$nom[1]),             "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Prenom :** ",             nn(id$prenom[1]),          "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Date de naissance :** ",  nn(id$date_naissance[1]),  "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Faculte 2eme cycle :** ", nn(id$faculte_2e_cycle[1]),"  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Annee ECN/EDN :** ",      nn(id$annee_edn[1]),       "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**DES initial :** ",        nn(id$des_initial[1]),     "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Faculte 3eme cycle :** ", nn(id$faculte_3e_cycle[1]),"  \n\n"))
}

dip <- params$diplomes
if (!is.null(dip) && nrow(dip) > 0) {
  cat("## Diplomes\n\n")
  tbl <- data.frame(
    Type       = dip$type_diplome,
    Intitule   = sapply(dip$intitule,   nn),
    Universite = sapply(dip$universite, nn),
    Annee      = sapply(dip$annee,      nn),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  print(knitr::kable(tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, linesep = ""))
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

\newpage

```{r contrat, eval=("contrat" %in% params$sections), results='asis'}
cat("# Contrat de formation\n\n")
cf <- params$contrat
if (!is.null(cf) && nrow(cf) > 0) {
  cat("## Projet professionnel\n\n")
  cat(nn(cf$projet_professionnel[1]), "\n\n")

  cat("## These de medecine\n\n")
  statut_lbl <- switch(nn(cf$these_statut[1]),
    non_debutee    = "Non debutee",
    sujet_en_cours = "Sujet en cours",
    sujet_valide   = "Sujet valide",
    en_cours       = "En cours de realisation",
    validee        = "Validee",
    "--"
  )
  cat(paste0("**Statut :** ",    statut_lbl,                   "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Sujet :** ",     nn(cf$these_sujet[1]),        "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Directeur :** ", nn(cf$these_directeur[1]),    "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Soutenance :** ",nn(cf$these_date[1]),         "  \n\n"))

  cat("## Objectifs - Connaissances\n\n")
  cat(nn(cf$obj_connaissances[1]), "\n\n")
  cat("## Objectifs - Competences\n\n")
  cat(nn(cf$obj_competences[1]), "\n\n")
}
```

\newpage

```{r connaissances, eval=("connaissances" %in% params$sections), results='asis'}
cat("# Portfolio de connaissances\n\n")
dc <- params$eval_conn
if (!is.null(dc) && nrow(dc) > 0) {
  n_acq <- sum(dc$autoeval == "acquis", na.rm = TRUE)
  n_tot <- nrow(dc)
  cat(sprintf("**Progression : %d / %d acquis (%.1f%%)**\n\n",
              n_acq, n_tot, 100 * n_acq / n_tot))

  for (dom in unique(dc$domaine)) {
    sub_d <- dc[dc$domaine == dom, ]
    n_d   <- sum(sub_d$autoeval == "acquis", na.rm = TRUE)
    cat(sprintf("\n## %s\n\n*%d / %d acquis*\n\n",
                gsub("[éè]","e", gsub("[àâ]","a", dom)), n_d, nrow(sub_d)))
    tbl <- data.frame(
      Niveau       = sub_d$niveau,
      Connaissance = sub_d$libelle,
      `Auto-eval`  = sapply(sub_d$autoeval, label_conn),
      Senior       = sapply(sub_d$eval_senior, label_conn),
      Evaluateur   = sapply(sub_d$evaluateur_senior, nn),
      check.names  = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    print(knitr::kable(tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE,
                       longtable = TRUE, linesep = ""))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

\newpage

```{r competences, eval=("competences" %in% params$sections), results='asis'}
cat("# Portfolio de competences\n\n")
dco <- params$eval_comp
if (!is.null(dco) && nrow(dco) > 0) {
  n_acq <- sum(dco$autoeval %in% c("acquis","en_cours"), na.rm = TRUE)
  n_tot <- nrow(dco)
  cat(sprintf("**Progression : %d / %d acquis ou en cours (%.1f%%)**\n\n",
              n_acq, n_tot, 100 * n_acq / n_tot))

  for (dom in unique(dco$domaine)) {
    sub_d <- dco[dco$domaine == dom, ]
    cat(sprintf("\n## %s\n\n",
                gsub("[éè]","e", gsub("[àâ]","a", dom))))
    tbl <- data.frame(
      Niveau      = sub_d$niveau,
      Competence  = sub_d$libelle,
      `Auto-eval` = sapply(sub_d$autoeval, label_comp),
      Senior      = sapply(sub_d$eval_senior, label_comp),
      Evaluateur  = sapply(sub_d$evaluateur_senior, nn),
      check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    print(knitr::kable(tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE,
                       longtable = TRUE, linesep = ""))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

\newpage

```{r stages, eval=("stages" %in% params$sections), results='asis'}
cat("# Carnet de stages\n\n")
ds <- params$stages
if (!is.null(ds) && nrow(ds) > 0) {
  tbl <- data.frame(
    Sem.    = paste("S", ds$semestre),
    Periode = sapply(ds$periode,           nn),
    Lieu    = sapply(ds$lieu,              nn),
    Resp.   = sapply(ds$responsable_stage, nn),
    check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  print(knitr::kable(tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE, linesep = ""))
}
```

\newpage

```{r phases, eval=("phases" %in% params$sections), results='asis'}
cat("# Validation des phases\n\n")
phase_labels <- c(
  socle             = "Phase Socle",
  approfondissement = "Phase d'Approfondissement",
  consolidation     = "Phase de Consolidation"
)
dp <- params$phases
for (ph in c("socle","approfondissement","consolidation")) {
  cat(sprintf("## %s\n\n", phase_labels[[ph]]))
  row <- if (!is.null(dp) && nrow(dp) > 0) dp[dp$phase == ph, ] else data.frame()
  if (nrow(row) > 0) {
    avis <- switch(nn(row$avis_commission[1]),
      valide     = "**Valide**",
      non_valide = "**Non valide**",
      ajourne    = "**Ajourne**",
      "*En attente*"
    )
    cat(paste0("**Avis :** ",       avis,                          "  \n"))
    cat(paste0("**Date :** ",       nn(row$date_validation[1]),    "  \n"))
    cat(paste0("**Signataire :** ", nn(row$validateur[1]),         "  \n"))
    if (!is.na(row$commentaire[1]) && nchar(row$commentaire[1]) > 0)
      cat(paste0("**Commentaire :** ", row$commentaire[1], "  \n"))
  } else {
    cat("*En attente de validation.*  \n")
  }
  cat("\n\n")
}
```

---
*e-Portfolio DES Sante Publique -- Referentiel pedagogique 2016 (CUESP/CIMES/CLISP).*
